sourcesContent:
export const adminDashboardDesign = {
  colors: {
    overlay:
      "fixed inset-0 bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-sm z-40 lg:hidden",
  },

  layout: {
    /* Wrapper */
    wrapper: "flex flex-col h-screen bg-slate-50",

    /* Navbar (64px height) */
    navbar:
      "h-16 flex items-center justify-between gap-4 px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 " +
      "bg-white border-b border-slate-200 shadow-sm z-30",

    /* Body layout */
    body: "flex flex-1 overflow-hidden",

    /* Sidebar */
    sidebar:
      /* Mobile & Tablet */
      "fixed inset-y-0 left-0 z-50 " +
      "h-screen " +
      "w-[85vw] max-w-[360px] " +
      "bg-slate-900 text-slate-100 " +
      "flex flex-col " +
      "transform transition-transform duration-300 ease-in-out " +
      "-translate-x-full " +

      /* Desktop */
      "lg:static lg:h-auto lg:w-64 xl:w-72 " +
      "lg:translate-x-0 " +
      "lg:border-r lg:border-slate-800 " +
      "lg:shadow-none " +

      /* Effects */
      "shadow-2xl shadow-black/40 " +
      "overflow-y-auto",

    /* Main content */
    content:
      "flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-6 sm:p-8 lg:p-10",
  },

  navbar: {
    menuButton:
      "lg:hidden p-2 text-slate-600 hover:text-slate-900 rounded-md transition",

    title:
      "hidden lg:block text-xl font-semibold text-slate-800",

    search:
      "flex-1 max-w-md px-4 py-2 rounded-lg border border-slate-300 bg-slate-50 " +
      "text-sm focus:outline-none focus:border-indigo-500 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-200 transition",

    avatarButton:
      "flex items-center gap-3 p-1.5 rounded-lg hover:bg-slate-100 transition",
  },

  dropdown: {
    wrapper:
      "absolute right-0 top-14 w-64 bg-white rounded-xl shadow-xl " +
      "border border-slate-200 py-2 z-50",

    header:
      "px-4 py-3 border-b border-slate-100 flex flex-col gap-1",

    item:
      "flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-2 text-sm text-slate-700 " +
      "hover:bg-slate-50 cursor-pointer transition",

    danger:
      "flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-2 text-sm text-red-600 " +
      "hover:bg-red-50 cursor-pointer transition",
  },

  sidebar: {
    header:
      "lg:hidden px-6 py-6 border-b border-slate-800 flex items-center justify-between",

    logo:
      "text-2xl font-bold text-white tracking-tight",

    subtitle:
      "text-sm text-indigo-300 mt-1 font-medium",

    closeBtn:
      "text-slate-300 hover:text-white text-xl p-2 rounded-md transition",

    nav:
      "flex flex-col gap-1 mt-6 px-3",

    navItem:
      "flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-3 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium " +
      "cursor-pointer hover:bg-slate-800 transition",

    navItemActive:
      "bg-indigo-800/30 text-indigo-300 border-l-4 border-indigo-500",
  },

  typography: {
    h1:
      "text-2xl sm:text-3xl font-bold text-slate-900",

    subtitle:
      "text-slate-600 mt-2",
  },
};
